texto: Compassion is, by definition, relational. Compassion literally means “to suffer with,” which implies a basic mutuality in the experience of suffering. The emotion of compassion springs from the recognition that the human experience is imperfect.
explicacao: Citação de Kristin Neff sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Compassion is, by definition, relational. Compassion literally means “to suffer with,” which impl…” articula reflexao, compassion, experience em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
